title: Tokokimo Single Duvet Cover Set 3 Piece Grey Bedding Sets with Fitted Sheet - Grey Branches Print Soft Microfiber Single Bedding (1x Duvet Cover, 1x Pillowcases, 1x 40cm Deep Fitted Sheet)
features: BEDDING SET WITH FITTED SHEET - 1x grey single duvet cover 135x200cm + 1x matching envelope pillowcases + extra 1x fitted sheet 90x190 cm with 40 cm deep pocket, are included in tokokimo 3 piece single duvet cover set with fitted sheet

SOFT WARM TO TOUCH - 3 piece single bedding is made of ultra soft microfibre, lightweight and breathable fabric which helps u enjoy tokokimo coziness of bedding set at night and keeps decent warmth all day. Botanical grey branches pattern clearly printed on grey bedding, which add beautiful colors for bedroom and looks more elegant on bedding

ALL AROUND ELASTIC - The all-around elastic used in the fitted sheet makes it fit easily onto the mattress while giving a nice finish to the bed. Durable zip fastening instead of buttons which makes the life easier

EASY CARE - Machine wash in cold water, tumble dry low, do not bleach. Colors would not fade and keeps new for long time. Modern style grey single duvet cover set with fitted sheet and pillowcases for bed set, tokokimo single duvet cover fits for bedroom, guestroom, dormitories during all seasons

HOME BEDDING CHOICE - Tokokimo single duvet cover set come with customized standard zipped packing bag, ship fast, and protect grey single bedding far from dirty or wrinkles. They would enjoy the soft warm touch and enjoy comfortable sleeping all day, be delighted with Tokokimo single bedding sets

NOTE: duvets and pillow insert are not included in.
